caption: A man with a beard, wearing a navy blue t-shirt, is seen in a picture-in-picture window and partially in the main shot, operating a card breaking station. He is positioned behind a table covered with a branded mat featuring orange circles and green palm trees. On the table sits a black rectangular organizer and various stacks of trading cards in plastic protectors. The background displays a logo that reads "JASPYS" in red and white, accompanied by the text "CASEBREAKS.COM" beneath it. Throughout the sequence, the man reaches out with his right hand to manipulate the items on the table. He moves his hand toward the black organizer and then reaches for a specific card protector from a stack, shifting his position slightly as he interacts with the collectibles. The scene remains focused on the table and his hand movements while his presence in the small window remains constant.
